title: Goth Mod
description:
Wacky mod that adds meme stuff to your Minecraft world !
the Immortal snail, emo and hello kitty girls that can hurt you and a new ore.
body:
Silly mod that shouldn't be taken seriously.

It adds :
1. the snail from the immortal snail meme;
2. goth/emo hello kitty girls;
3. a new purplish material called Burgundian.
4. More to come...

My first ever mod, made mostly with KaupenJoe's tutorial series on youtube:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=55qUIf3GMss&list=PLKGarocXCE1H9Y21-pxjt5Pt8bW14twa-

Bugs may occur and overall balance of the items/entities added is almost inexistent right now.

Also, the skins used for the girls aren't made by me, so if you're any of the creators of the used skins and want me to take them down, contact me.
